颱風追擊：熱帶氣旋 百里嘉

1823號熱帶氣旋 百里嘉 BARIJAT (27W)
來源：美國
意義：馬紹爾語，沿岸地區受風浪影響的意思

【註】 發出颱風追擊帖，表示有熱帶氣旋在南海或西北太平洋一帶形成。　為使大家有一個良好舒適的瀏覽環境，請不要張貼未經證實的風暴消息、使用簡體中文貼文、提及力場或洗版，謝謝合作。　請勿直接張貼會自動更新的氣象圖片，請把圖片上傳至儲存空間後再轉貼在帖文上。謝謝。　以下圖片會自動更新，直至熱帶氣旋消散。

FFS-美國全球預報系統(GFS)的俗稱，諷刺其計算結果如同FF，但近一年預報準確度有所提升
馮瑞權-澳門氣象局前局長
風水權-馮瑞權俗稱
風水靜，神婆靜，作法靜，巫婆靜-前任澳門氣象局副局長梁嘉靜俗稱，現為首席顧問高級技術員，一度停職4個月。
赤的疑惑-高登氣象台台長
七長官/7長官-製作氣象台警報gif會員
Rose-製作高登風格天氣警告圖的會員，其作品並不授予連登使用
楊振權副庭長-Baroclinic於高登的最新名字
桜の抹茶刺身-連登氣象post負責人1
道地檸檬綠茶-連登氣象post負責人2
雪菜肉絲炆米-連登颱風航空交通post負責人
夏天冬天夏天(#45439)-有一定氣象知識但經常發表與氣溫相關煩膠言論的會員。
逝去的不回來(#162037)-夏天冬天夏天的新AC，經常派膠乞膠，事跡罄竹難書。
一個地球人-連登中仔細分析颱風走向及其他高空氣象圖的高質會員
當榴蓮遇上芒果-連登中另一位氣象知識豐富的高質會員
李棟旭-連登中製作大量有趣的氣象post相關改圖的會員（包括以上四幅術語圖）
南珠隻狗-連登中氣象知識亦較豐富的會員
伊甸園菜肉餃-伊甸園市長在連登的最新名字
堅豎-土豆在連登的分身
力場J-貼出李首富照片並提醒各巴絲記得準時返工的會員
DH-direct hit 本港一百公里內掠過
中出-風暴中心直接橫過本港
貓5- cat5 五級颱風的英文簡稱
五隻貓-同上，有cat1-5
醉警-酷熱天氣警告誤字
南海之王-氣象迷對香港天文台的尊稱，指其對南海熱帶氣旋預測表現良好，但只限接近廣東沿岸的南海部份，因此又被稱為南海北部之王
STNR-滯留不動
N0.1-向北移0.1度，/E/S/W（東/南/西）同理
8中X-天文台指定8個測風站中有X個達標
login-登陸，源於cctvb錯將″登陸″打成″登錄″
login password-由上引申之術語，意指登陸地
近岸爆發-熱帶氣旋在靠近沿岸時急劇增強，令沿岸地區威脅大增
0號觀望訊號-香港傳媒於熱帶氣旋仍末形成時，已大肆吹奏香港會打風；又或熱帶氣旋已形成，但並非採取接近本港之路徑，傳媒卻仍吹奏有機會打風。此詞用於諷刺傳媒猶如代替天文台發出熱帶氣旋警告訊號
(香港)暴雨走廊-指大嶼山東北起，經荃青葵，擴展至沙田大埔一段，因西南水汽易受此一帶地型抬升影響較易有暴雨。靈感來自美國「龍捲風走廊」。以下為經典例子。

WDPN31 PGTW 111500
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/PROGNOSTIC REASONING FOR SUPER TYPHOON 26W (MANGKHUT) WARNING
NR 19//
RMKS/
1. FOR METEOROLOGISTS.
2. 6 HOUR SUMMARY AND ANALYSIS.
SUPER TYPHOON (STY) 26W (MANGKHUT), LOCATED APPROXIMATELY 254 NM
NORTH OF YAP, FSM, HAS TRACKED WESTWARD AT 12 KNOTS OVER THE PAST SIX
HOURS. ANIMATED ENHANCED INFRARED SATELLITE IMAGERY SHOWS A SYMMETRIC
AND HIGHLY CONSOLIDATED SYSTEM WITH COMPACT FEEDER BANDS SPIRALING
TIGHTLY INTO A SHARPLY-OUTLINED 23-NM EYE. THE INITIAL POSITION IS
PLACED WITH HIGH CONFIDENCE BASED ON THE EYE FEATURE. THE INITIAL
INTENSITY OF 140 KNOTS IS BASED ON EQUIVALENT DVORAK ESTIMATES OF
T7.0 FROM PGTW AND RJTD. UPPER LEVEL ANALYSIS INDICATES STY 26W IS IN
AN AREA OF LOW VERTICAL WIND SHEAR AND EXCELLENT RADIAL OUTFLOW WITH
A STRONG EASTWARD CHANNEL INTO A TUTT CELL. ADDITIONALLY, ALONG TRACK
SEA SURFACE TEMPERATURES IN THE PHILIPPINE SEA AT 28-30 CELSIUS ARE
HIGHLY CONDUCIVE. THE CYCLONE IS TRACKING ALONG THE SOUTHERN
PERIPHERY OF A DEEP-LAYERED EAST-WEST ORIENTED SUBTROPICAL RIDGE
(STR) TO THE NORTH.
3. FORECAST REASONING.
A. THERE IS NO CHANGE TO THE FORECAST PHILOSOPHY FROM THE
PREVIOUS WARNING.
B. STY 26W WILL TRACK MORE WEST-NORTHWESTWARD AFTER TAU 12 AS THE
STR WEAKENS IN RESPONSE TO AN APPROACHING MIDLATITUDE TROUGH. THE
FAVORABLE ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS WILL PERSIST AND SUPPORT
CONTINUED INTENSIFICATION TO A PEAK OF 150 KNOTS BY TAU 36.
AFTERWARD, REDUCED OUTFLOW AS THE SYSTEM MOVES AWAY FROM THE TUTT
CELL WILL SLIGHTLY WEAKEN THE SYSTEM TO 135 KNOTS BY TAU 72 AS IT
APPROACHES NORTHERN LUZON. CONFIDENCE IN THIS PORTION OF THE JTWC
FORECAST TRACK REMAINS HIGH BASED ON THE TIGHT GROUPING IN THE
NUMERICAL MODEL GUIDANCE.
C. AFTER TAU 72, STY MANGKHUT WILL CONTINUE ON A MORE
NORTHWESTWARD TRAJECTORY UNDER THE STEERING INFLUENCE OF THE WEAKENED
STR. THE CYCLONE WILL ENTER THE LUZON STRAIT AND PASS BETWEEN TAIWAN
AND THE PHILIPPINES INTO THE SOUTH CHINA SEA. INTERACTION WITH LAND
AND DIMINISHING OUTFLOW WILL PRIMARILY BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ITS GRADUAL
DECAY. HOWEVER, BY TAU 120, THE SYSTEM WILL STILL BE A SOLID 80-KNOT
TYPHOON WHEN IT MAKES LANDFALL TO THE WEST OF HONG KONG. THE TRACK
GUIDANCE REMAINS IN TIGHT AGREEMENT WITH CTCX AS THE LONE
LEFT-OF-TRACK OUTLIER. THERE IS ALSO HIGH CONFIDENCE IN THE EXTENDED
JTWC FORECAST TRACK THAT IS LAID JUST RIGHT OF MODEL CONSENSUS TO
OFFSET THE UNLIKELY CTCX SOLUTION.//
NNNN

quote.msg:
WDPN31 PGTW 111500
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/PROGNOSTIC REASONING FOR SUPER TYPHOON 26W (MANGKHUT) WARNING
NR 19//
RMKS/
1. FOR METEOROLOGISTS.
2. 6 HOUR SUMMARY AND ANALYSIS.
SUPER TYPHOON (STY) 26W (MANGKHUT), LOCATED APPROXIMATELY 254 NM
NORTH OF YAP, FSM, HAS TRACKED WESTWARD AT 12 KNOTS OVER THE PAST SIX
HOURS. ANIMATED ENHANCED INFRARED SATELLITE IMAGERY SHOWS A SYMMETRIC
AND HIGHLY CONSOLIDATED SYSTEM WITH COMPACT FEEDER BANDS SPIRALING
TIGHTLY INTO A SHARPLY-OUTLINED 23-NM EYE. THE INITIAL POSITION IS
PLACED WITH HIGH CONFIDENCE BASED ON THE EYE FEATURE. THE INITIAL
INTENSITY OF 140 KNOTS IS BASED ON EQUIVALENT DVORAK ESTIMATES OF
T7.0 FROM PGTW AND RJTD. UPPER LEVEL ANALYSIS INDICATES STY 26W IS IN
AN AREA OF LOW VERTICAL WIND SHEAR AND EXCELLENT RADIAL OUTFLOW WITH
A STRONG EASTWARD CHANNEL INTO A TUTT CELL. ADDITIONALLY, ALONG TRACK
SEA SURFACE TEMPERATURES IN THE PHILIPPINE SEA AT 28-30 CELSIUS ARE
HIGHLY CONDUCIVE. THE CYCLONE IS TRACKING ALONG THE SOUTHERN
PERIPHERY OF A DEEP-LAYERED EAST-WEST ORIENTED SUBTROPICAL RIDGE
(STR) TO THE NORTH.
3. FORECAST REASONING.
A. THERE IS NO CHANGE TO THE FORECAST PHILOSOPHY FROM THE
PREVIOUS WARNING.
B. STY 26W WILL TRACK MORE WEST-NORTHWESTWARD AFTER TAU 12 AS THE
STR WEAKENS IN RESPONSE TO AN APPROACHING MIDLATITUDE TROUGH. THE
FAVORABLE ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS WILL PERSIST AND SUPPORT
CONTINUED INTENSIFICATION TO A PEAK OF 150 KNOTS BY TAU 36.
AFTERWARD, REDUCED OUTFLOW AS THE SYSTEM MOVES AWAY FROM THE TUTT
CELL WILL SLIGHTLY WEAKEN THE SYSTEM TO 135 KNOTS BY TAU 72 AS IT
APPROACHES NORTHERN LUZON. CONFIDENCE IN THIS PORTION OF THE JTWC
FORECAST TRACK REMAINS HIGH BASED ON THE TIGHT GROUPING IN THE
NUMERICAL MODEL GUIDANCE.
C. AFTER TAU 72, STY MANGKHUT WILL CONTINUE ON A MORE
NORTHWESTWARD TRAJECTORY UNDER THE STEERING INFLUENCE OF THE WEAKENED
STR. THE CYCLONE WILL ENTER THE LUZON STRAIT AND PASS BETWEEN TAIWAN
AND THE PHILIPPINES INTO THE SOUTH CHINA SEA. INTERACTION WITH LAND
AND DIMINISHING OUTFLOW WILL PRIMARILY BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ITS GRADUAL
DECAY. HOWEVER, BY TAU 120, THE SYSTEM WILL STILL BE A SOLID 80-KNOT
TYPHOON WHEN IT MAKES LANDFALL TO THE WEST OF HONG KONG. THE TRACK
GUIDANCE REMAINS IN TIGHT AGREEMENT WITH CTCX AS THE LONE
LEFT-OF-TRACK OUTLIER. THERE IS ALSO HIGH CONFIDENCE IN THE EXTENDED
JTWC FORECAST TRACK THAT IS LAID JUST RIGHT OF MODEL CONSENSUS TO
OFFSET THE UNLIKELY CTCX SOLUTION.//
NNNN

BY TAU 120, THE SYSTEM WILL STILL BE A SOLID 80-KNOT
TYPHOON WHEN IT MAKES LANDFALL TO THE WEST OF HONG KONG.

WDPN31 PGTW 111500
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/PROGNOSTIC REASONING FOR SUPER TYPHOON 26W (MANGKHUT) WARNING
NR 19//
RMKS/
1. FOR METEOROLOGISTS.
2. 6 HOUR SUMMARY AND ANALYSIS.
SUPER TYPHOON (STY) 26W (MANGKHUT), LOCATED APPROXIMATELY 254 NM
NORTH OF YAP, FSM, HAS TRACKED WESTWARD AT 12 KNOTS OVER THE PAST SIX
HOURS. ANIMATED ENHANCED INFRARED SATELLITE IMAGERY SHOWS A SYMMETRIC
AND HIGHLY CONSOLIDATED SYSTEM WITH COMPACT FEEDER BANDS SPIRALING
TIGHTLY INTO A SHARPLY-OUTLINED 23-NM EYE. THE INITIAL POSITION IS
PLACED WITH HIGH CONFIDENCE BASED ON THE EYE FEATURE. THE INITIAL
INTENSITY OF 140 KNOTS IS BASED ON EQUIVALENT DVORAK ESTIMATES OF
T7.0 FROM PGTW AND RJTD. UPPER LEVEL ANALYSIS INDICATES STY 26W IS IN
AN AREA OF LOW VERTICAL WIND SHEAR AND EXCELLENT RADIAL OUTFLOW WITH
A STRONG EASTWARD CHANNEL INTO A TUTT CELL. ADDITIONALLY, ALONG TRACK
SEA SURFACE TEMPERATURES IN THE PHILIPPINE SEA AT 28-30 CELSIUS ARE
HIGHLY CONDUCIVE. THE CYCLONE IS TRACKING ALONG THE SOUTHERN
PERIPHERY OF A DEEP-LAYERED EAST-WEST ORIENTED SUBTROPICAL RIDGE
(STR) TO THE NORTH.
3. FORECAST REASONING.
A. THERE IS NO CHANGE TO THE FORECAST PHILOSOPHY FROM THE
PREVIOUS WARNING.
B. STY 26W WILL TRACK MORE WEST-NORTHWESTWARD AFTER TAU 12 AS THE
STR WEAKENS IN RESPONSE TO AN APPROACHING MIDLATITUDE TROUGH. THE
FAVORABLE ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS WILL PERSIST AND SUPPORT
CONTINUED INTENSIFICATION TO A PEAK OF 150 KNOTS BY TAU 36.
AFTERWARD, REDUCED OUTFLOW AS THE SYSTEM MOVES AWAY FROM THE TUTT
CELL WILL SLIGHTLY WEAKEN THE SYSTEM TO 135 KNOTS BY TAU 72 AS IT
APPROACHES NORTHERN LUZON. CONFIDENCE IN THIS PORTION OF THE JTWC
FORECAST TRACK REMAINS HIGH BASED ON THE TIGHT GROUPING IN THE
NUMERICAL MODEL GUIDANCE.
C. AFTER TAU 72, STY MANGKHUT WILL CONTINUE ON A MORE
NORTHWESTWARD TRAJECTORY UNDER THE STEERING INFLUENCE OF THE WEAKENED
STR. THE CYCLONE WILL ENTER THE LUZON STRAIT AND PASS BETWEEN TAIWAN
AND THE PHILIPPINES INTO THE SOUTH CHINA SEA. INTERACTION WITH LAND
AND DIMINISHING OUTFLOW WILL PRIMARILY BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ITS GRADUAL
DECAY. HOWEVER, BY TAU 120, THE SYSTEM WILL STILL BE A SOLID 80-KNOT
TYPHOON WHEN IT MAKES LANDFALL TO THE WEST OF HONG KONG. THE TRACK
GUIDANCE REMAINS IN TIGHT AGREEMENT WITH CTCX AS THE LONE
LEFT-OF-TRACK OUTLIER. THERE IS ALSO HIGH CONFIDENCE IN THE EXTENDED
JTWC FORECAST TRACK THAT IS LAID JUST RIGHT OF MODEL CONSENSUS TO
OFFSET THE UNLIKELY CTCX SOLUTION.//
NNNN

T7.0 FROM PGTW AND RJTD. UPPER LEVEL ANALYSIS INDICATES STY 26W IS IN
AN AREA OF LOW VERTICAL WIND SHEAR AND EXCELLENT RADIAL OUTFLOW WITH
A STRONG EASTWARD CHANNEL INTO A TUTT CELL. ADDITIONALLY, ALONG TRACK
SEA SURFACE TEMPERATURES IN THE PHILIPPINE SEA AT 28-30 CELSIUS ARE
HIGHLY CONDUCIVE. THE CYCLONE IS TRACKING ALONG THE SOUTHERN
PERIPHERY OF A DEEP-LAYERED EAST-WEST ORIENTED SUBTROPICAL RIDGE
(STR) TO THE NORTH.
3. FORECAST REASONING.
A. THERE IS NO CHANGE TO THE FORECAST PHILOSOPHY FROM THE
PREVIOUS WARNING.
B. STY 26W WILL TRACK MORE WEST-NORTHWESTWARD AFTER TAU 12 AS THE
STR WEAKENS IN RESPONSE TO AN APPROACHING MIDLATITUDE TROUGH. THE
FAVORABLE ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS WILL PERSIST AND SUPPORT
CONTINUED INTENSIFICATION TO A PEAK OF 150 KNOTS BY TAU 36.
AFTERWARD, REDUCED OUTFLOW AS THE SYSTEM MOVES AWAY FROM THE TUTT
CELL WILL SLIGHTLY WEAKEN THE SYSTEM TO 135 KNOTS BY TAU 72 AS IT
APPROACHES NORTHERN LUZON. CONFIDENCE IN THIS PORTION OF THE JTWC
FORECAST TRACK REMAINS HIGH BASED ON THE TIGHT GROUPING IN THE
NUMERICAL MODEL GUIDANCE.
C. AFTER TAU 72, STY MANGKHUT WILL CONTINUE ON A MORE
NORTHWESTWARD TRAJECTORY UNDER THE STEERING INFLUENCE OF THE WEAKENED
STR. THE CYCLONE WILL ENTER THE LUZON STRAIT AND PASS BETWEEN TAIWAN
AND THE PHILIPPINES INTO THE SOUTH CHINA SEA. INTERACTION WITH LAND
AND DIMINISHING OUTFLOW WILL PRIMARILY BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ITS GRADUAL
DECAY. HOWEVER, BY TAU 120, THE SYSTEM WILL STILL BE A SOLID 80-KNOT
TYPHOON WHEN IT MAKES LANDFALL TO THE WEST OF HONG KONG. THE TRACK
GUIDANCE REMAINS IN TIGHT AGREEMENT WITH CTCX AS THE LONE
LEFT-OF-TRACK OUTLIER. THERE IS ALSO HIGH CONFIDENCE IN THE EXTENDED
JTWC FORECAST TRACK THAT IS LAID JUST RIGHT OF MODEL CONSENSUS TO
OFFSET THE UNLIKELY CTCX SOLUTION.//
NNNN

香港天文台在2018年09月12日04時45分發出之天氣報告
香 港 天 文 台 發 出 最 新 熱 帶 氣 旋 警 報

一 號 戒 備 信 號 ， 現 正 生 效 。

表 示 有 一 熱 帶 氣 旋 ， 在 香 港 約 800 公 里 內 ， 可 能 影 響 本 港 。

在 上 午 5 時 ， 熱 帶 風 暴 百 里 嘉 集 結 在 香 港 之 東 南 約 270 公 里 ， 即 在 北 緯 20.6 度 ， 東 經 116.0 度 附 近 ， 預 料 向 西 移 動 ， 時 速 約 18 公 里 ， 大 致 移 向 廣 東 西 部 沿 岸 。

本 港 現 時 吹 偏 北 風 ， 風 力 較 弱 。 按 照 現 時 預 測 路 徑 ， 百 里 嘉 會 在 今 日 下 午 稍 後 最 接 近 本 港 ， 於 香 港 以 南 約 100 至 200 公 里 附 近 掠 過 。 隨 著 百 里 嘉 靠 近 珠 江 口 ， 本 港 今 日 日 間 漸 轉 吹 東 風 ， 風 力 會 有 所 增 強 ， 間 中 有 狂 風 驟 雨 。 天 文 台 會 視 乎 本 港 風 力 變 化 ， 在 上 午 十 時 後 考 慮 改 發 三 號 強 風 信 號 。

一 號 戒 備 信 號 － 防 風 措 施 報 告 ：

1. 請 採 取 防 風 措 施 ， 並 檢 查 門 窗 有 無 損 壞 。

2. 請 將 堆 積 在 渠 道 上 的 樹 葉 與 垃 圾 清 除 ， 低 窪 地 區 市 民 應 為 防 範 水 浸 做 好 準 備 。

3. 在 熱 帶 氣 旋 影 響 本 港 期 間 須 執 行 任 務 的 人 員 ， 請 隨 時 準 備 奉 召 出 動 。

4. 海 面 可 能 會 有 湧 浪 ， 市 民 應 該 遠 離 岸 邊 。

5. 請 留 意 電 台 、 電 視 台 或 瀏 覽 香 港 天 文 台 網 頁 及 流 動 應 用 程 式 有 關 熱 帶 氣 旋 的 最 新 消 息 。

轉載
【超強颱風“山竹”即將給廣東帶來嚴重風雨威脅！ 】從目前形勢上看，未來颱風“山竹”撞山機率不大，基本上會穿過巴士海峽或擦過呂宋北部沿海地區進入南海東北部隨後強勢襲擊廣東省！ 9月14日副熱帶高壓西南脊線引導氣流正在讓超強颱風“山竹”由偏西逐漸轉為西北偏西方向移動，我國南方上空的帶狀副高維持穩定並間接引導超強颱風偏向西行，由於前進路徑北抬，那麼這樣一來“山竹”撞擊呂宋島概率正在減少。
9月15日副熱帶高壓西南脊線將繼續讓超強颱風“山竹”路徑有所偏北向西北偏西方向移動，中國南方上空的帶狀副高繼續穩定維持間接引導超強颱風“山竹”偏向西行，此時“山竹”已經穿過巴士海峽，同時副高偏東引導氣流將會有所加大將讓超強颱風“山竹”移速有所加快向東沙群島一帶逼近！與此同時受到颱風“山竹”外圍環流雨帶襲擊，台灣東部地區首當其衝將有一次暴雨到大暴雨降水過程！台灣東南部沿海地區將出現9-10級陣風11-13級大風！另外廣東東部外海風力將逐漸加大致8-9級陣風10-11級！有效波高也將加大致6-7米！
9月16日早上由於高空槽引導冷高壓（冷空氣）東移擴散南下，在颱風“山竹”和冷高壓共同作用之下，將可能會撕破穩定維持在中國南方上空的帶狀副高控制區並產生崩潰出現斷裂！然而位於西太平洋上的主體副高將繼續引導颱風“山竹”快速向西北偏西方向移動，此時颱風“山竹”已逼近廣東省南部近海，這里風切較低，海溫較高再配上西南季風水汽支持，“山竹”將依然可以維持超強颱風級（15-16級）強度！廣東南部外海風力將逐漸加大至10-11級陣風12-14級！颱風中心經過附近海面風力15-16級！陣風17級！同時“山竹”外圍環流雨帶將陸續上岸影響廣東中南部沿海地區。不過由於“山竹”西側逐漸吸入乾冷空氣對流爆發可能將會出現減弱，然而反過來“山竹”東南側由於有西南季風水汽持續供應，因此其東南側水汽輻合動力條件將會非常強！可想而知“山竹”東南螺旋雨帶將會是最猛烈的部位！
從9月16日下午開始颱風“山竹”東南螺旋雨帶將強勢掃上廣東東南部以及珠三角沿海地區，將陸續給（珠三角）帶來歷史性狂風暴雨天氣！廣東中南部包括珠三角大部分市縣風力將加大至8-9級陣風10-11級！
隨著颱風“山竹”靠岸，預計9月16日傍晚到夜間（17-21時）颱風“山竹”將可能在廣東（台山—陽江）附近沿海地區強勢登陸！登陸前將會減弱，登陸時最低氣壓935hpa左右！可能為強颱風或超強颱風級！其螺旋雨帶將繼續向廣東內陸西部推進，廣東南部包括珠三角在內的（江門.佛山.肇慶.雲浮.陽江）等地將全方位陷入狂風暴雨之中！平均風力將加大到9-10級！陣風11-12級！颱風登陸附近沿海地區風力將達14-15級！陣風16級！颱風“山竹”登陸前後將給南海北部和廣東近海帶來8-10米的有效波高！颱風中心經過附近海域有效波高將高達13-14米！
颱風“山竹”登陸後將繼續快速西行並穿過廣東西南部在9月17日凌晨進入廣西東南部地區減弱為強熱帶風暴級強度，也將會給廣西東南部地區帶來較強風雨天氣過程！
